languages.text: "Компаньон?" {n}Тонкогубый рот гемункула растягивается в кривой ухмылке.{/n} "Ты про эту костяную скорлупку, принадлежащую болтливому бездарю? Мон-кай, ты в действительности считаешь его чем-то... одушевленным? Ха!" {n}Неприятный смешок Тервантьяса отзывается зудом в ваших ушах.{/n}

"A colleague, you say?" {n}The Haemonculus's face stretches into a crooked thin-lipped grin.{/n} "You mean that bony shell belonging to that chattering fool? Mon-keigh, do you really treat it as something... alive? Ha!" {n}His unpleasant chuckle prickles in your ears.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Компаньон?" {n}Тонкогубый рот гемункула растягивается в кривой ухмылке.{/n} "Ты про эту костяную скорлупку, принадлежащую болтливому бездарю? Мон-кай, ты в действительности считаешь его чем-то... одушевленным? Ха!" {n}Неприятный смешок Тервантьяса отзывается зудом в ваших ушах.{/n}

"A colleague, you say?" {n}The Haemonculus's face stretches into a crooked thin-lipped grin.{/n} "You mean that bony shell belonging to that chattering fool? Mon-keigh, do you really treat it as something... alive? Ha!" {n}His unpleasant chuckle prickles in your ears.{/n}

"A colleague, you say?" {n}The Haemonculus's face stretches into a crooked thin-lipped grin.{/n} "You mean that bony shell belonging to that chattering fool? Mon-keigh, do you really treat it as something... alive? Ha!" {n}His unpleasant chuckle prickles in your ears.{/n}

languages.text: "Ein Kollege sagt Ihr?" {n}Der Haemonculus verzieht sein Gesicht zu einem schiefen Grinsen.{/n} "Ihr meint diese Knochenhülle, die zu diesem plappernden Narren gehört? Chem-Pan-Sey, behandelt Ihr das Ding wirklich als würde es ... leben? Ha!" {n}Sein unangenehmes Lachen kribbelt in deinen Ohren.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A colleague, you say?" {n}The Haemonculus's face stretches into a crooked thin-lipped grin.{/n} "You mean that bony shell belonging to that chattering fool? Mon-keigh, do you really treat it as something... alive? Ha!" {n}His unpleasant chuckle prickles in your ears.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ein Kollege sagt Ihr?" {n}Der Haemonculus verzieht sein Gesicht zu einem schiefen Grinsen.{/n} "Ihr meint diese Knochenhülle, die zu diesem plappernden Narren gehört? Chem-Pan-Sey, behandelt Ihr das Ding wirklich als würde es ... leben? Ha!" {n}Sein unangenehmes Lachen kribbelt in deinen Ohren.{/n}

languages.text: « Un collègue, vous dites ? {n}Le visage de l'hémoncule se fend d'un rictus.{/n} Vous voulez dire que cette coquille osseuse appartient à cet imbécile babillard ? Mon-keigh, considérez-vous vraiment cette chose comme... un être vivant ? Ha ! » {n}Son éclat de rire vous vrille les oreilles.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A colleague, you say?" {n}The Haemonculus's face stretches into a crooked thin-lipped grin.{/n} "You mean that bony shell belonging to that chattering fool? Mon-keigh, do you really treat it as something... alive? Ha!" {n}His unpleasant chuckle prickles in your ears.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Un collègue, vous dites ? {n}Le visage de l'hémoncule se fend d'un rictus.{/n} Vous voulez dire que cette coquille osseuse appartient à cet imbécile babillard ? Mon-keigh, considérez-vous vraiment cette chose comme... un être vivant ? Ha ! » {n}Son éclat de rire vous vrille les oreilles.{/n}

languages.text: «¿Un colega, dices?». {n}El rostro del Hemónculo se estira en una sonrisa retorcida con sus labios finos.{/n} «¿Te refieres al cascarón óseo de ese necio parlanchín? Mon-keigh, ¿de verdad lo consideras algo... vivo? ¡Ja!». {n}Su risotada desagradable se clava en tus oídos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A colleague, you say?" {n}The Haemonculus's face stretches into a crooked thin-lipped grin.{/n} "You mean that bony shell belonging to that chattering fool? Mon-keigh, do you really treat it as something... alive? Ha!" {n}His unpleasant chuckle prickles in your ears.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Un colega, dices?». {n}El rostro del Hemónculo se estira en una sonrisa retorcida con sus labios finos.{/n} «¿Te refieres al cascarón óseo de ese necio parlanchín? Mon-keigh, ¿de verdad lo consideras algo... vivo? ¡Ja!». {n}Su risotada desagradable se clava en tus oídos.{/n}

languages.text: "Meslektaş mı?" {n}Haimonkulus'un yüzü çarpık, ince dudaklı bir sırıtışla geriliyor.{/n} "Şu gevenin kemikli kabuğunu mu kastediyorsun? Mon-keigh, ona gerçekten... Canlı bir şeymiş gibi mi davranıyorsun? Ha!" {n}Rahatsız edici kıkırdaması, kulaklarını tırmalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A colleague, you say?" {n}The Haemonculus's face stretches into a crooked thin-lipped grin.{/n} "You mean that bony shell belonging to that chattering fool? Mon-keigh, do you really treat it as something... alive? Ha!" {n}His unpleasant chuckle prickles in your ears.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Meslektaş mı?" {n}Haimonkulus'un yüzü çarpık, ince dudaklı bir sırıtışla geriliyor.{/n} "Şu gevenin kemikli kabuğunu mu kastediyorsun? Mon-keigh, ona gerçekten... Canlı bir şeymiş gibi mi davranıyorsun? Ha!" {n}Rahatsız edici kıkırdaması, kulaklarını tırmalıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “同僚？”{n}血伶人薄薄的嘴唇弯出一个歪斜的冷笑。{/n}“你指的是那个多嘴多舌的蠢货身边的那个白骨空壳？猴子，你真把它当成……活的了？哈！”{n}他那令人不快的轻笑声刺得你耳朵发痒。{/n}
languages.original_text: "A colleague, you say?" {n}The Haemonculus's face stretches into a crooked thin-lipped grin.{/n} "You mean that bony shell belonging to that chattering fool? Mon-keigh, do you really treat it as something... alive? Ha!" {n}His unpleasant chuckle prickles in your ears.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “同僚？”{n}血伶人薄薄的嘴唇弯出一个歪斜的冷笑。{/n}“你指的是那个多嘴多舌的蠢货身边的那个白骨空壳？猴子，你真把它当成……活的了？哈！”{n}他那令人不快的轻笑声刺得你耳朵发痒。{/n}

languages.text: 「同僚ですか？」{n}ヘモノーキュラスの顔は歪んだ薄笑いに歪む.{/n}「あのしゃべりまくる愚か者の骨の殻のことですか？モンケィ、本当にそれを...生きているものだと考えているのですか？ハッ！」{n}彼の不快な笑い声は耳に刺さる.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A colleague, you say?" {n}The Haemonculus's face stretches into a crooked thin-lipped grin.{/n} "You mean that bony shell belonging to that chattering fool? Mon-keigh, do you really treat it as something... alive? Ha!" {n}His unpleasant chuckle prickles in your ears.{/n}
